title: Darko Macan

{{Quote|Within an universe as developed as ''Star Wars'' one is, there is a very evident danger of a story getting lost amidst all the nods to the continuity and the tippings of the hat to the fellow creators. I, therefore, try to be informed but I primarily stick to the movies and try to make the story equally enjoyable to everyone, even someone who presumably has just stumbled upon it without any previous knowledge of the ''Star Wars'' universe.|Darko Macan|<ref name="TFN interview">{{WebCite|url=https://www.theforce.net/jedicouncil/interview/darko&rich.asp|text=Darko Macan and Rich Handley|work=[[TheForce.net]]|author=Jeff Boivin|archivedate=20250521051112}}</ref>}}
'''Darko Macan''' (born [[1960s|1966]]) is a [[Wikipedia:Croatia|Croatian]] author and illustrator who has created and collaborated on [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]], essays and science fiction and fantasy. He is also an editor. Born in [[Wikipedia:Zagreb|Zagreb]], where he still lives, he has a degree in history and archaeology from the [[Wikipedia:University of Zagreb|University of Zagreb]].<ref name="Alchetron">{{WebCite|url=https://alchetron.com/Darko-Macan|text=Darko Macan|work=Alchetron|archivedate=20251116022320}}</ref>

He has drawn and written many comic books, mostly in Croatian, but in [[1993]] he broke into the American comics industry when he and fellow Croatian artist [[Edvin Biukovic|Edvin Biuković]] submitted their work to [[Dark Horse Comics]]. He has also done ''[[Wikipedia:Donald Duck|Donald Duck]]'' and ''[[Wikipedia:Mickey Mouse|Mickey Mouse]]'' for [[Wikipedia:The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] comics. He was nominated for the [[Wikipedia:Eisner Award|Eisner Award]] twice (''Grendel Tales: Devils and Deaths'' and ''Prayer to Sun'').<ref name="Alchetron" />

As a writer, he has sold more than forty [[Wikipedia:Science fiction|science fiction]] and fantasy short stories, two science fiction novels and three children's books. He has won four [[Wikipedia:SFera Awards|SFera Awards]] and two Grigor Vitez Awards.

Under the pseudonym '''Cecile Quintal''' he has written essays about comics.

He was editor of nine [[Wikipedia:Annual Collections of Croatian SF|Annual Collections of Croatian SF]]. He is editor-in-chief of the "''Q strip''" comics magazine.

He wrote [[Star Wars: Chewbacca (Dark Horse)|''Star Wars: Chewbacca'']], ''[[Star Wars: Jedi vs. Sith]]'', and ''[[Vader's Quest|Star Wars: Vader's Quest]]'' for [[Dark Horse Comics]], as well as "[[Lady Luck (comic story)|Lady Luck]]" and ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Phantom Affair]]'' (with art by fellow Croatian comic creator, and friend, [[Edvin Biukovic]]).
